name: Smart Model Switch
description: Probe models, maintain available list, sync provider baseUrl+apiKey to OpenClaw config. Prefer MiniMax; on session error remove model; hourly re-probe.

providers.description: Per-provider baseUrl, apiKey, and models. Synced to openclaw.json models.providers.

preferProvider.description: Provider to prefer when picking from available list (default: minimax)

probeIntervalHours.description: Hours between full probe of all models (default: 1)
